title: Are you struggling with Arrays while integrating Monday & Make automation?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Masterclass in Array & Collections
Most Make users struggle to work with complex Arrays, Collections, and arrays inside an array.
We decoded three powerful methods that can help you overcome almost all challenges working with arrays & collections.
To share this knowledge with you all, we decided to conduct a live workshop, where you will learn;

291000399_2982697818687891_3468752783468763594_n1705×960 160 KB

  • How to get an item from an array in three methods
  • How to extract an item from a dynamic collection
  • How to Combine the Typeform and Calendly Question & Answers in just two operations

To ensure the quality of learning we opened only 20 seats in this workshop. Don’t miss out, reserve your seat today.
The workshop is scheduled for Friday 1st July at 11:00 AM EST.
Register at: https://www.msquare.pro/product-page/masterclass-handle-array-collections-like-a-pro-on-make-com
